name: Persimmon Cookies# 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the sugar and butter until creamy.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the persimmon pulp.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, ground cloves, chopped nuts, and raisins.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes in a preheated 350°F oven, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
